name: Keysino Separation Technology Inc.
summary: Keysino Separation Technology Inc. engages in the consulting, design, manufacture, installation, commissioning, and maintenance of membrane separation equipment for various industrial fluid users. The company offers high-concentration brine recycling, industrial waste alkali recycling, industrial waste acid recycling, microcrystalline filtration, high COD wastewater treatment, CIP cleaning solution recycling, dyeing and printing wastewater treatment and recycling, pulping and papermaking waste liquid resource utilization, inorganic membrane, organic ultra/nano filtration, electrically-driven membrane, and ion exchange systems. Its filtration equipment is used in petrochemical, steel metallurgy, textile printing and dyeing, food fermentation, bio-pharmaceutical, and pulp and paper industries. Keysino Separation Technology Inc. was founded in 2015 and is based in Shanghai, China.
